setting: The year is 2187, and humanity’s first orbital outpost stands as a beacon of hope in the void. The *Aurora-9* is a frontier stronghold where daring engineers and scientists push the limits of space exploration, balancing survival against the relentless demands of the cosmos.

roles.name: Overseer of the Void
roles.description: You maintain life support, repair failing systems, and ensure the station’s survival against the harshness of space.

roles.name: Starborn Explorer
roles.description: You analyze data, unlock new technologies, and uncover the mysteries of the universe—though every discovery demands sacrifice.

roles.name: Commander of the Orbit
roles.description: You coordinate missions, allocate resources, and keep morale high—while ensuring the station’s fate rests in your hands.
